Subject: Re: Insurance & Additional Insured Requirements

Dear CTX eval B,

Thank you for the thoughtful question—this is exactly the kind of detail we want to address clearly before your December celebration in Tuscany.

We do carry commercial liability insurance as part of our standard business practice. However, the specifics of naming your venue as an additional insured—including whether that's already covered under our existing policy or requires a separate endorsement—will depend on the venue's exact requirements and our carrier's terms.

The good news: this is a common request for destination venues, and we're experienced in coordinating with both our insurer and your venue to ensure compliance. Once we've reviewed your venue's certificate of insurance (COI) requirements, we'll work directly with our provider to arrange the appropriate coverage and documentation. In most cases, adding a venue as an additional insured is straightforward, though occasionally there may be a nominal fee depending on the carrier's process.

**Next step:** If you can share the specific language from your venue contract (or have them send their COI requirements directly), we'll coordinate with our insurance team and confirm exactly what's needed—and whether any additional cost applies—well ahead of your wedding day.

Does that help clarify the process? Happy to walk through any other vendor coordination details as they come up.

Warmly,

[Studio Manager]  
*Luxury Wedding Photography*

whatEachLayerDoes.A: CRM snapshot only (weddings row) — no harness playbook_rules or case memories.
whatEachLayerDoes.B: + playbook_rules (same rows fetchActivePlaybookRulesForDecisionContext loads for live V3).
whatEachLayerDoes.C: + case memory (memories row type v3_verify_case_note) — appears in writer facts as case headers.
whatEachLayerDoes.D: + best-effort thread_summaries + prior messages on same thread before first wait (may race with worker).
whatEachLayerDoes.E: playbook without Elite row — failure-mode vs client saying Elite.

nextOptimization: If D’s continuity injection races, add a deterministic delay or a dedicated ‘pause until injected’ gate; if A still confirms Elite, tighten writer when playbook_rules blob is empty.
